name: Booker HQ
subject: Have you ever wanted to hang out with Rosario Dawson AND Cory Booker?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Team, You may have seen Rosario Dawson in the audience during this week's debate. She'll be at the next one too -- and you could be sitting right next to her. **[If you donate whatever you can right now, you will be automatically entered for a chance to watch the next DNC debate with Rosario and a friend of your choice. We'll cover your hotel and airfare. ](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191018_BHQ_20191018-fr-BHQ-Rocontest3-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** But wait, this contest gets even better. The very next day, you'll enjoy a meal with **Cory AND Rosario**. That's right, you'll get to debrief with both of them about Cory's debate performance the night before. **[This is a once-in-a-lifetime opportunity you don't want to miss. Chip in today to be automatically entered to win. And remember, we'll take care of your flight and hotel accommodations.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191018_BHQ_20191018-fr-BHQ-Rocontest3-actives_actives_l2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** November 20th. Atlanta, Georgia. Mark your calendar. Best of luck,
Booker HQ [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario?refcode=em_fr_20191018_BHQ_20191018-fr-BHQ-Rocontest3-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=") _No purchase, payment, or contribution is necessary to enter or win and will not improve chances of winning. Void where prohibited. Entries must be received by November 13, 2019. Enter by contributing[here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4f/4019954105/VEsC/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-contest-cory-and-rosario") or [click here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4e/4019954105/VEsD/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://bookerlive.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/Cory-and-Rosario-Contest") to enter without contributing. One (1) winner will receive the following prize package: round-trip tickets for winner and one guest from within the fifty U.S. States, DC, or Puerto Rico to Atlanta, GA; one-night hotel accommodations for winner and one guest; opportunity to have a meal with Senator Booker and Rosario Dawson; opportunity to attend the November DNC Presidential Debate (approx. retail value $3,000). Odds depend on number of entries received. Promotion open only to U.S. citizens, or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents of 50 United States, District of Columbia and Puerto Rico and 18 or older (or age of majority under applicable law). View full official rules [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4d/4019954105/VEsA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/cory-rosario-you/"). Sponsor: Cory 2020, PO Box 32009, Newark, NJ 07102._
---
| | Paid for by Cory 2020
---

P.O. Box 32009 Newark, NJ 07102 | All content (C) 2019 Cory 2020, All Rights Reserved.
Contributions or gifts to Cory 2020 are not tax deductible.
If you got this message from a friend, [you can add your name now to get email updates directly from Cory 2020.](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4c/4019954105/VEsB/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter")
This campaign is moving quickly. If you want the most up-to-date information, follow Cory on [Instagram](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4b/4019954105/VEsO/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.instagram.com/corybooker/"), [Twitter](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4a/4019954105/VEsP/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://twitter.com/corybooker"), and [Facebook](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca49/4019954105/VEsHBQ/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://www.facebook.com/corybooker").
It's time for leadership that can reignite our spirit of common purpose. That takes all of us. We believe these emails are an important way to stay in touch, but if at any point you'd like to stop getting these updates, you can unsubscribe [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca48/4019954105/VEsHBA/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://act.corybooker.com/unsubscribe").
Is this not your preferred email address? You can update your contact info [here](https://act.corybooker.com/page/m/4fdc0a15/5fca0d19/76823288/291fca4c/4019954105/VEsHBw/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://corybooker.com/join?source=em_emfooter").

314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443f/4bd7760e/44d8076d/77dc9527/2484929643/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_FR_191018_Amy36_U1_X1&source=314_EM_FR_191018_Amy36_U1_X1")

name: Andrew Yang
subject: I just finished a 10-hour Q&A
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
body:
We took voter questions and called supporters for 10 hours straight today.

| [](http://act.yang2020.com/go/68?t=1&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0) Yang Gang --

We just finished our marathon 10-hour question and answer session. We took questions from our website, Twitter, Facebook, Reddit, Quora, and over the phone. I hope you were able to tune in.

This, like many things in this campaign, was unprecedented. No candidate has ever done this before, and I assume not many would.

It was important to me to get our message out there and to let voters get to know more about me than a 12-person debate would allow.

[If you want a president that will listen to the voters and not be afraid to tackle the tough questions, I hope you can contribute to this campaign before midnight. We set a goal of 10,000 contributions today and need your help to reach it.](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13964?t=5&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0) | [Pitch In](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13964?t=7&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0)
---
I want to be a president that is accessible and listens to the American people. That’s important to me -- and it’s one of the reasons I’m in this race.

But to win, I will need every member of this team to step up and be in this fight with me.

Thank you for being a part of this,

-Andrew
**Most of our donations come from people like you chipping in small amounts when they can. Your continued generosity helps us keep building this movement.** | [Contribute](https://act.yang2020.com/go/13964?t=6&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We're proud you're part of the Yang Gang! But if you want to receive less email from us, you can do that [here.](https://act.yang2020.com/signup/email-actionkit-feweremails-20190821/?t=2&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0) And if you absolutely don't want to hear from us again you can [unsubscribe here.](https://act.yang2020.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0) Contributions or gifts to Friends of Andrew Yang are not tax deductible. | Paid for by Friends of Andrew Yang
---
© 2019 Friends of Andrew Yang
All Rights Reserved
New York, NY
[Privacy Policy](https://www.yang2020.com/privacy-policy?t=4&akid=1877%2E377263%2Ebr_x-0)

name: Sri Preston Kulkarni
subject: Keeping guns out of the WRONG hands
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sri for Congress
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/4bk_8xICwqxz-HqFLv9XoBb-3qryeP6SQmlxP0xPolU=?refcode=20191019_redflaglawsja)
---
[**SIGN ON NOW: Support red flag laws to keep guns out of the WRONG hands! ⇒ **](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=) Team - gun violence has impacted too many communities across the country, including our own here in the Houston-metro area. We must do more to protect our residents and safeguard our children. **[It is long past time for common-sense solutions that will keep guns out of the hands of dangerous people and help save lives. It's time to implement red flag laws.](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=)** | ******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=)******
---

What are red flag laws? Well, historically, there have often been warning signs before violence occurs, and family and friends are usually the first to see them. Red flag laws empower families, communities, and law enforcement officials to speak up when they are concerned, giving law enforcement a chance to take action and prevent tragedies before they happen.
**These laws are a proven way to keep guns out of the wrong hands.[Will you join me in supporting this common-sense life-saving reform NOW? -> ](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=)**

******[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=)******
---

Red flag laws have already been enacted in 17 states and saved lives across the country. **But it will take a groundswell of public pressure and support for our lawmakers to make sure every state, including Texas, has access to this critical gun violence prevention measure. **
[**Can you help me achieve this goal by signing our petition and showing your support today?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/vcN34FITn5bJtUdvTCx5wlUuFWvqgmRDNKPQsL2W-1M=/-2fUjnYJNRIKUVP2oF9ISYQGp4NbfO2LbAMHMKkDyUU=)
Thank you for standing with me,
Sri Preston Kulkarni

We must do more to protect our residents and safeguard our children. = | ****=** What are red flag laws? Well, historically, there have often been warning signs before violence occurs, and family and friends are usually the first to see them. Red flag laws empower families, communities, and law enforcement officials to speak up when they are concerned, giving law enforcement a chance to take action and prevent tragedies before they happen. These laws are a proven way to keep guns out of the wrong hands.= **=** Red flag laws have already been enacted in 17 states and saved lives across the country. But it will take a groundswell of public pressure and support for our lawmakers to make sure every state, including Texas, has access to this critical gun violence prevention measure. = Thank you for standing with me, Sri Preston Kulkarni **** STAY CONNECTED WITH OUR MOVEMENT = = =** | Paid for by Sri for Congress. name: Nikki Haley
subject: Term Limits Now!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stand For America
body:
The time has come to place term limits on our politicians. We have too many Washington politicians who stay in D.C. for 30 or 40 years, and completely lose touch with their constituents.
To unsubscribe visit [here](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/2036/1/?90482085=aHR0cDovL2N0NC5kbXNncy5uZXQvdT9pZD0xMzYwNjgxOTUuMTU3NDk2ZTNhYjU2NmU1NGRmOGE4YTlkYTIyYjY0OTImbj1UJmw9YS1ncyZvPTY0MTQ5NzE%3d&x=8c64e009)

[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/108599/2/)
Friend,
The time has come to place term limits on our politicians. **We have too many Washington politicians who stay in D.C. for 30 or 40 years,** and completely lose touch with their constituents. **These career politicians become indebted to the special interests, and end up voting based on their needs, not based on the issues.**
[**Sign the petition today to show your support for term limits >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/108599/3/)
**D.C. needs new ideas and a fresh perspective** to move our nation forward and be responsive to what Americans want.
The incumbency advantage allows members to perpetually be reelected, because they are **constantly fundraising,** and **building war chests** that **crush the ability of challengers to run competitive campaigns.**
[**Sign the petition today to show your support for term limits >>>**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/108599/4/)
**States across the country have placed term limits on their state legislatures.** They have seen great success in **increasing the number of people running for office.**
**Friend, we need you!** [**Please sign our petition to show your support for term limits and help us fight to bring new ideas to Washington.**](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/108599/5/)
Thank you.
My very best,
[](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/108599/6/)

[Privacy Policy](http://ct4.dmsgs.net/t/6414971/136068195/75219/7/)
Paid for by Stand For America
---
PO Box 1003, Alexandria, VA 22313

name: Margaret Good
subject: Let’s talk about the issues
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Margaret Good for Congress
body:
Before we launched this campaign back in July, our race wasn't on anyone's radar. ...
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/qpt_wDET4j548faBeJLpMwlfETKwXuH2EspioVgLrD0=/hpYijPjN9sGoeVAiZ_SuwLkWafr1P-6kt3xMVEbQS3U=?refcode=em_POLL_2019.10.18_b1_mg_all&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000)
---
Friends,

Before we launched this campaign back in July, our race wasn't on anyone's radar.

However, thanks to the tremendous support of our grassroots community, Florida's 16th district is not only on the map, _**we 're now one of the top pick up opportunities for Democrats in 2020.**_

Winning this race matters because it gives us the opportunity to put forward legislation that will actually make a difference in people's lives.

I decided to run for Congress because we have some serious issues that our current representative isn't addressing at all. I have a lot of ideas about what our biggest priorities should be, but I want to hear directly from you. My team and I will review every response to help us continue to build a campaign that you can be proud of. |
_**Take our October survey!**_

| Your Record
---

dpwillis67@gmail.com
---

**What issues are keeping you up at night?**

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: An update from the road
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ac/3453572454/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | I've said it from the start: we're building a different kind of Senate campaign, to elect a different kind of Senate. That means bringing as many people as possible into the process, re-engaging those who've lost faith in our politics and welcoming folks who never felt included in the first place. **[That's what our movement is all about. It's why we're thousands strong, and growing every day. Chip in now to get our message out to every corner of the Commonwealth!](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ad/3453572454/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-17-otr&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** In the last two weeks, that mission has brought me to a food pantry, nonprofit organizations, union meetings, and child advocacy groups. There, I've heard from folks who too many politicians overlook, learning about the work they do and the challenges they face. [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ad/3453572454/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-17-otr&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ad/3453572454/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-17-otr&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") And I've met with people in diners and pubs, talking to those who've been left out of and let down by their representatives, asking them to support a new kind of politics that works for all people. [](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ad/3453572454/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-17-otr&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100") It's still early in the campaign, but we've already got tremendous momentum, and I'm proud of our team and the rapidly-growing grassroots progressive movement we're building. And we're not slowing down. I'll be visiting with folks all over the Commonwealth over the next few months, listening and learning and inviting people to join our fight. **[Contribute now to keep building our grassroots movement for a different kind of politics.](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ad/3453572454/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIzIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjl2Ym1WOWZRPT0iOiI1IiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjkwZDI5OWZRPT0iOiIxNSIsImUzdGhZbUZ0ZEY5MGFISmxaWDE5IjoiMjUiLCJlM3RoWW1GdGRGOW1iM1Z5ZlgwPSI6IjUwIiwiZTN0aFltRnRkRjltYVhabGZYMD0iOiIxMDAifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?refcode=2019-10-17-otr&recurring=1&amount=3&amounts=5,15,25,50,100")** Thank you for being part of this movement. As always, I'm honored to fight by your side. _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3ae/3453572454/VEsB/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-10-17-otr&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3af/3453572454/VEsO/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-10-17-otr&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3a8/3453572454/VEsP/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-10-17-otr&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://action.joekennedyforcongress.com/page/m/3639157e/55b66746/2c178212/80ce3a9/3453572454/VEsHBQ/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-10-17-otr&refcode2=express-buttons")

name: Dr. Kelli Ward
subject: ICYMI: HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Arizona Republican Party
body:
Some say a picture is worth a thousand words. I’ll give you two pictures worth five words: “HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE”.

| | |
---
[Unsubscribe](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/unsubscribe.php?M=12866825&C=0b6f38152d66c2289a1aca01ec9ec4be&E=dpwillis67%2540gmail.com&L=632&N=79408&AGENCY=PMI)
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Fellow Republican,
Remember this picture of former Arizona Governor Jan Brewer raising her finger to President Obama on the tarmac and how it drove the unstable media into a tizzy? Remember how they labeled Governor Brewer as rude and racist for daring to confront Obama in such a manner?
| [HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79408&L=24032&F=H)
---

Well, in an abrupt about-face, the [Mainstream Media](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79408&L=24033&F=H) is now applauding Nancy Pelosi for raising her finger to President Trump while demanding he keep U.S. troops in Syria indefinitely. But, because Nancy Pelosi is a Democrat, she’s hailed a hero. Where's the accountability for the hypocrisy and obvious bias from the media? We know they won't hold themselves accountable, so it's up to us!

If media bias is not addressed, liberal reporters will continue to carry water for the radical Left. **[Support the Republican Party of Arizona and our mission to HOLD THE FAKE NEWS ACCOUNTABLE](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79408&L=24032&F=H)**.

Signed,

[](https://victory.azgop.com/wta/link.php?AGENCY=PMI&M=12866825&N=79408&L=24032&F=H)

Dr. Kelli Ward
Chairman
Republican Party of Arizona
|

|
---

Phoenix, AZ 85016

I don't have millions in personal wealth to pour into this race. Our campaign is powered by people like you. Not corporate PACs. Not federal lobbyists. Not fossil fuel or pharma execs.
Our campaign is growing at a rapid pace -- including key investments in hiring additional staff and opening more offices in the early states -- and we need our fundraising trajectory to keep up.

If you believe that campaigns should be built from the ground up -- not the top down -- please donate to support our efforts.**](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-october?refcode=em_fr_20191019_CB_20191019-fr-CB-Steyer-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")

name: Climate News Alert (via 314 Action)
subject: not one single question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www
body:
---
| | Jay Inslee shared his take away from the Democratic Debate on Wednesday:
## **Jay Inslee shared his take away from the Democratic Debate on Wednesday:**
[](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ec0/2202554783/VEsH/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1") [**We 're with the Governor -- it's outrageous that not a single question was asked regarding one of the biggest threats to our national security. Do you agree?**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ecd/2202554783/VEsE/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=2+-+Wersquore+with+the+Governor++itrsquos+ou&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1") | | | [Weigh in >>](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75eca/2202554783/VEsF/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Weigh+in+gtgt&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")
---
Earth just experienced one of the hottest Septembers on record, and experts estimate we have **less than 12 years** before climate change has an **irreversible impact on the planet.**
Just weeks after millions of people around the globe participated in the Climate Strike, it is unacceptable that Washington, DC pundits are **STILL** refusing to ask a single question about climate change.
[**Do you agree that climate change is one of this generation 's biggest threats and must be discussed at the next debate?**](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ec9/2202554783/VEsC/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=4+-+Do+you+agree+that+climate+change+is+one+&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")
| | [Yes!](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ed6/2202554783/VEsD/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+Yes&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")
---
| | [No.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ed4/2202554783/VEsA/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=6+-+No&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")
---
Your voice is critical to the conversation -- thank you for speaking up!
\-- 314 Action

| [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ede/2202554783/VEsB/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "http://www.314action.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=7+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")
---
| | Paid for by 314 Action Fund, [www.314actionfund.org](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75edb/2202554783/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://www.314actionfund.org/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+www314actionfundorg&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1"), not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee.
---
314 Action is a grassroots community of nearly 1 million people working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.
If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can [click here to make a donation.](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb443c/4bd7760e/44d73a1e/77c75ed8/2202554783/VEsP/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314_footer?refcode=emailfooter&amount=31.41&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=9+-+click+here+to+make+a+donation&utm_campaign=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1&source=314_EM_EN_191019_InsleeTweet_U1_X1")

name: Jason Yates
subject: TOMORROW: My Faith Votes partners with Christian Music’s Dove Awards
body:
| | We’ll encourage Christians to “Do Good and Go Vote!”
---
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h_pmCxCO2c7H1rOkQ8qGGjVoOZARCXaMc-xORpXBZ0Y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=1)
| Hi Peter, I want to make sure you know about the [50th annual GMA Dove Awards](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=h_pmCxCO2c7H1rOkQ8qGGjVoOZARCXaMc-xORpXBZ0Y&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=2) airing exclusively **tomorrow, October 20, at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT, on TBN!** It’s going to be a great evening of music and entertainment with artist nominees including Lauren Daigle, for KING & COUNTRY, Kirk Franklin, Phil Wickham, TobyMac, Crowder, Tasha Cobbs, and many more! We’re honored to partner with the GMA Dove Awards this year as the media sponsor, encouraging Christians to “Do Good and Go Vote.” **In the days and weeks following the event, watch for My Faith Votes exclusive behind the scenes videos with the artists! You’ll be encouraged to hear about how they bring their faith into our culture through music and stand boldly for Christ.** With more than 80,000 elections taking place this year and well over 100,000 elections just around the corner in 2020, it’s critically important that we help awaken Christians to pray, think and vote! Pray with us that Christians will not only enjoy watching the music awards show on TBN, but that they would also hear our video commercial reminding them to “Do Good Go Vote.” Tune in Sunday to TBN at 8 PM ET / 5 PM PT - it’s a unique event you will not want to miss! Don’t have cable? [You can watch the livestream on our Facebook page](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=3). **United. We Stand.** Jason Yates
CEO
[](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=FvZODUdzRCV4_QVEoUI5Y_LYDGbWPUdf00keax2EMv8&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=4)
---
* * *
©2019 My Faith Votes
10940 S Parker, 640, Parker, CO 80134
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/unsubscribe?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=5).
[ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sQ5cX_bEu8cPkWYJ2Mr5-wZKXu3dY5XWtaPM4h3adih&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=6) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=pQzeq3ow3I_GdDaQAo3jThGOsBJSnRMSTnYdqF5RrFw9RIPs8jarlLWzFCwppO5s&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=7) [ ](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y-k8vVr8cJ4CYXZKhF1mHHVF_9enIccjId0FBdBJJ7Kr&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e191019com01&n=8)

name: Team Mahony
subject: 10,000 signers to protect reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
Action Alert ->

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191019choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
| Friend,

After Republican statehouses passed extreme, oppressive versions of so-called "heartbeat bills" around the country, one of them has been challenged all the way up to the Supreme Court.

Earlier this month, the Supreme Court decided to take up an Alabama case that could set a precedent for overturning Roe v. Wade.

**[We need 10,000 citizen co-sponsors to sign on TODAY to demand Congress pass legislation to ensure women have full access to comprehensive reproductive healthcare. Will you add your name right now?](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://mahony.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-protect-reproductive-rights?refcode=em191019choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://mahony.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-protect-reproductive-rights?refcode=em191019choice&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
**The government -- state or federal -- should never come between a woman and her health care provider. And as your Senator, Josh will ensure that women have full control of their own health care choices.**

These are difficult times, but I'm ready to face our challenges head-on.

**[We have to take urgent action: Add your name right now and help us hit our goal of 10,000 citizen co-sponsors demanding Congress ensure women have control of their own bodies.](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://mahony.cp.bsd.net/page/signup/add-your-name-to-protect-reproductive-rights?refcode=em191019choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=cta1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Let's do this together,

Team Mahony

---
| | Josh Mahony is a native Arkansan, non-profit leader and a long-time business owner. He's running to replace Tom Cotton and make sure everyday Arkansans have a voice in the Senate. If you want a senator who speaks for you and isn't bought and paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting. [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-october?refcode=em191019choice&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---

PAID FOR BY MAHONY FOR U.S. SENATE

Mahony for Senate
P.O. Box 1884
Fayetteville, AR 72702
United States

This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. To unsubscribe, go to: https://secure.joshuamahony.com/unsubscribe.

name: Team Stephanie
subject: We want to hear from you,
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**
body:
You've heard from Stephanie, now we want to hear from you.
|
---

| | Friends,

Grassroots supporters like you know that Stephanie is the next leader for New Jersey's 4th District. We've shown her that our grassroots movement can and will continue to keep this campaign moving to the finish line. You've heard all about Stephanie, and now we want to hear what matters most to supporters like you. [**Friends, can you take a moment to fill out our issues survey?**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0bc/522d4087/7afd9370/4f342a6d/3860607557/VEsH/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3MVX9NC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEFriends+can+you+take+a+moment+t&utm_campaign=20191019_em&source=20191019_em") | **[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0bc/522d4087/7afd9370/4f342a6c/3860607557/VEsE/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3MVX9NC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=2+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=20191019_em&source=20191019_em")**
---
As we build our game plan for the months ahead, we want you there with us.
Stephanie knows what it will take to win this race, and she knows that together we'll do the work to flip the final Republican-held district in New Jersey.
[**But first, take a moment and tell us what issues matter most to you:**](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0bc/522d4087/7afd9370/4f342a6b/3860607557/VEsF/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3MVX9NC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=3+-+But+first+take+a+moment+and+tell+us+what&utm_campaign=20191019_em&source=20191019_em")
**[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://stephanie.bsd.net/page/m/5eff0bc/522d4087/7afd9370/4f342a6a/3860607557/VEsC/?g=a8xLfFNw52hdjvzlCIGBu2A "https://www.surveymonkey.com/r/3MVX9NC?utm_medium=email&utm_source=stephanie&utm_content=4+-+TAKE+THE+SURVEY&utm_campaign=20191019_em&source=20191019_em")**
---
Thanks for everything,
Team Stephanie
|
---

| | **Paid for by Stephanie for New Jersey**

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Martha McSally and the GOP should be worried about her Q3 fundraising numbers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hi Peter, GOP Senator Martha McSally released her third quarter fundraising numbers, and if we were her, we'd be worried for 2020. With all of her corporate PAC money and large dollar donors, she still managed to only raise about half as much as her Democratic opponent, former astronaut and Navy fighter pilot Mark Kelly. Kelly has been making serious headway in flipping this critical Senate seat blue, and Arizona voters are noticing \-- he's up 47 to 45 against McSally. _The Cook Political Report_ , _Inside Elections_ , and _Sabato 's Crystal Ball_ have all placed Martha McSally's Arizona seat firmly in the "Toss-Up" category. With her seat at risk, we know McSally will do anything, including cheating and breaking campaign finance laws, to win \-- because she's already been caught violating campaign finance laws **_multiple times!_** We're asking voters what they think about this race, and we need 117 more responses before MIDNIGHT: **Who do you support for U.S. Senate?** [Mark Kelly](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb4/6e9863e8/15baea67/1db0f365/2899024910/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lU-U2X8v") [Martha McSally](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb4/6e9863e8/15baea67/1db0f365/2899024910/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/lU-U2X8v") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb4/6e9863e8/15baea67/1db0f364/2899024910/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kellyvmcsally-nd?refcode=OUT20191019a.ND-b&refcode2=FOvUW05qEuCM6SdqojUH")

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: The stakes are too high
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
One of Mark's Republican opponents is asking his supporters for help to "defend the Senate Majority."
|
---
| | Derek,

One of Mark's Republican opponents is asking his supporters for help to "defend the Senate Majority." **Like Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell, Mark's Republican opponents want to flip Virginia red** so they can maintain the Trump GOP's hold on power -- and it's our job to stop them. | ****[RUSH A DONATION TO
HELP MARK FIGHT BACK](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d021/53d9897e/521801bf/1c8b6b4f/3311970554/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI4NiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-majority?refcode=20191019nd__286__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")****
---
The truth is that if we want a Democratic majority in the Senate in January 2021, we _have_ to reelect Mark here in the Commonwealth. **But we can't take anything for granted -- not with the Trump campaign expanding its Virginia operations from its headquarters in our own backyard!**

The stakes are too high to fall short. **If Trump wins Virginia and defeats Mark in the process, it will be a disaster** for our healthcare, our economy, our foreign policy and more.

We're working hard to make sure that doesn't happen, but we have a lot of doors to knock on and phone calls to make between now and Election Day. **Will you make a donation right now to help us keep Virginia's Senate seat blue?**

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: Coffee with Trump campaign Co-Chair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
It's hard to imagine how divided our nation has become as I walk and meet the wonderful people of New Hampshire! I stopped by Robie’s Country Store (circa 1822) in Hooksett for a cup of coffee and enjoyed comfortable conversations with everyone, including many who have seen news reports about my walk or my TV ads airing here. [**I sat down with the co-chair of the Trump campaign in New Hampshire and his wife**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017964/111639085/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&refcode= em101919p1), as we discussed their children’s naval service and mine, as well as about the great division currently afflicting our nation.
[**Contribute**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017966/111639088/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&refcode= em101919c)
It is [**why I am running**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017968/111639090/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&refcode= em101919p2): yes, to bring my depth and breadth of **global experience** to assure a peaceful and prosperous world under U.S. leadership, _**but first and foremost to unite our nation**_.
[**Please contribute to continue my efforts to do so!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017976/111639092/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&refcode= em101919p3)
Warmly,
Joe

[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017977/111639100/-601034299?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&refcode= em101919b)
Come on board. We encourage you to [visit our website](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11017978/111639101/-209557350?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzM4YWNjNy1hOWYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QxsuSxau0ZlZZsfhUrdanzoIbMAJ1Srgilyvek8WXZ8=&emci=c1b253d2-99f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=dc38acc7-a9f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)

name: Team Weld
subject: fwd: enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
body:
|
---
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL4sRw_CV25kY04lB6FnbmQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=1) Did you see Bill’s email? With everyone going on at home and abroad, it’s important that we take a moment and remember it doesn’t have to be this way, and that there IS something we can do to stop this. We hope you’ll consider joining us on this journey. | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL4sRw_CV25kY04lB6FnbmQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=2)
---
— Team Weld
\---- Forwarded message ----
**From** : Bill Weld <info@weld2020.org>
**Date** : October 18, 2019
**To** : dpwillis67@gmail.com
[](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL4sRw_CV25kY04lB6FnbmQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=3)
Friend,
Enough is enough.
Just yesterday, the Trump administration:
* admitted to a corrupt quid-pro-quo in efforts to persuade Ukraine to investigate political opponents,
* “negotiated” a ceasefire between Turkish and Syrian forces (which was literally broken hours after Trump Admin officials left the area),
* and announced that President Trump’s own property would host the G7 summit--while telling the world that nobody will ever see how that decision was made.

I wish I could tell you that everything that’s happening in our politics is normal. Or reasonable. Or acceptable.
Unfortunately, I can’t. Every day is something new, and trying to keep up with the whirlwind of un-American, dystopian issues we face each morning is a continuous challenge.
But those feelings of anxiety and hopelessness? They’re not permanent. And there is something you can do to fight back today.
The polls show us gaining ground to hold POTUS accountable in this Republican primary. For that momentum to continue, we need to channel our concerns into action. And to do that, I need your help.
**[Please consider joining this movement and sending a donation today. This is a fight worth winning, and it’s something that we can all feel proud to be a part of.](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL4sRw_CV25kY04lB6FnbmQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=4)**
You have my word that when I’m President, the daily nonsense will end the minute I swear my oath.
| [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U22QTbrxfBbsWSKLnwes7AeDwuG0almTZT7rKwoxdnpXGL4sRw_CV25kY04lB6FnbmQ&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=5)
---
Thanks for standing with me,
Bill
Paid for by Weld for President 2020 Presidential Campaign Committee · United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/unsubscribe?e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=6).
You can also keep up with Team Weld on [Twitter](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNEee0J3CzZBj8v0TKy2tYMM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=7) or [Facebook](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6sD5mbawGI5P2loKSMnHaUPJQdagn1SdGMQUy6UvfZqO&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=8).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=SWqLExi-4iBlEOa5qgO58jA2d62deOsOLwOgchKDecY&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191019_fr_s&n=9), software for leaders.

name: Team Beto
subject: Invitation: Take our Campaign Strategy Survey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
body:
[1]Beto for America

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1001&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]Take our Campaign Strategy Survey

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1002&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]We just released our plan for how we want to win this race.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1003&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]But we can't pull this off without knowing what our supporters think:
What do you think about our plan to win?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1004&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]Take our campaign strategy survey

Hi,

One of our favorite parts about hitting the campaign trail is getting to
hear directly why you support Beto.

Folks tell us lots of different stories about the moment they realized
they wanted to be on Team Beto. Some were inspired by Beto’s historic
Senate run, they got a chance to talk to him at a town-hall, they had a
volunteer knock on their door, they admired the way he stood his ground at
the debate, or they saw a video of him on instagram and really liked his
way of doing things.

We’re on a mission to get more people to have these Team Beto moments. So
we’re launching a big push for the next couple of weeks to introduce more
people to Beto’s story and to strengthen our organizing efforts on the
ground.

But the only way we can know if our plan is strong, is checking in with
loyal supporters like you. [ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1005&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]Will you please take our short Campaign
Strategy Survey?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1006&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]What do you think should be the biggest priority in Team Beto’s plan
to win?

[7]( ) Focusing on early states
[8]( ) Investing more in TV ads
[9]( ) Reaching out to non-traditional voters
[10]( ) Qualifying for the November Debate
[11]( ) Raising $2 million to pay for new programs
[12]( ) Hiring additional staff members to our organizing team
[13]( ) Increasing contact with voters via text or phone call
[14]( ) Other

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/survey/beto-email-survey-20191019/?source=ema20191019-62307&t=1007&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8 ]Continue the survey →

This is a people-powered campaign. Our movement is being built by
grassroots donors chipping in as much as they can –– folks who know that
the outcome of this race depends on what we do and who we choose to fight
for.

That’s why it’s important to us that those same people get to have a say
in our campaign’s future.

Let us know what you think about our plan to win!

-Team Beto

Contribute to Beto's campaign: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/beto-for-america-emails?refcode=em20191019footer&t=1008&refcode2=62307_444211_jpU6k8&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1009&akid=62307%2E444211%2EjpU6k8

PAID FOR BY BETO FOR AMERICA
P.O. Box 3628 El Paso, TX 79923

subject: the question that nobody asks

body:

| Team,

When Michael took the stage Tuesday night to field questions from caucusgoers in Iowa, he was asked a question he'd like to hear more often.

Instead of being asked about Ellen DeGeneres or Twitter fights, Michael was asked how he'd handle the ballooning national debt. And he has a plan to fix it.

[I don't know about you team, but we think these are the sorts of issues presidential candidates should be discussing.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbaef7/134673f2/a01979a/6997e68a/549625777/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/teambfa?refcode=EM_FR_B1_101919_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,35,50,100,250,500,1000")

[**By having conversations about issues that matter and sharing Michael 's vision voter by voter, state by state, we're building a grassroots movement. clean_body: | | | Team, When Michael took the stage Tuesday night to field questions from caucusgoers in Iowa, he was asked a question he'd like to hear more often. Instead of being asked about Ellen DeGeneres or Twitter fights, Michael was asked how he'd handle the ballooning national debt. And he has a plan to fix it. "" "" | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" Polls show that 90% of Democrats haven't decided on a candidate yet, and given the focus most candidates are putting on flashy media appearances, it isn't hard to see why. "" "" | | "" Together, Bennet Campaign HQ | | Paid for by Bennet for America Contributions or gifts to Bennet for America are not tax deductible.

**Calling for Impeachment**

After hearing Thursday's comments from White House Chief of Staff Mick Mulvaney confirming that U.S. military aid was held from Turkey because the president wanted political favors, Gov. Kasich is supporting the impeachment process.

He spoke about the importance of both parties putting the politics aside, for the U.S. House to approve Articles of Impeachment and for it to move to a trial in the U.S. Senate. The Democrats are relentless and their fundraising numbers are massive. I'll get right to the point.

Democrats are doing everything in their power to _**IMPEACH**_ our president.

So, it's critical we do everything in our power to restore our Conservative majority.

name: Senator Jeff Merkley
subject: We are building a movement to stop the violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
| [](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cf9c/6cd27893/5256b318/15876151/404082625/VEsH/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "http://www.jeffmerkley.com")
---

| | It's all an act. **In the aftermath of mass shootings, Donald Trump pretends to have courage when it comes to taking on gun violence. But, in the end, he never does anything.** All it takes is one call from the NRA, and he falls into line. Parkland. El Paso. Las Vegas. Orlando. Dayton. Every time, Trump calls for reforms. He makes a public scene about the need for universal background checks. And then... _nothing._ And the NRA gets its way. [**That's why we have to take action in 2020. Sign my petition and commit to supporting candidates who will take on gun violence.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cf9c/6cd27893/5256b318/1587614e/404082625/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/gun-violence/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-10-gun-violence-email") **Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their pals at the NRA are betting that if they keep quiet, eventually the storm of anger about gun violence will pass.** Not if we have anything to say about it. **Our movement is growing.** It will bring strength to polling places all across America, and a massive change our country and families deserve. [**Sign our petition: Commit to supporting 2020 candidates who will fight back against the scourge of gun violence in our country.**](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cf9c/6cd27893/5256b318/1587614e/404082625/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/gun-violence/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-10-gun-violence-email") **_Jeff_** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.jeffmerkley.com/page/m/16c2cf9c/6cd27893/5256b318/1587614e/404082625/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=fjbuEq_HJ6FcsCg1a40jRRA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/gun-violence/merkley/e/#firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&subsource=pet-2019-10-gun-violence-email") |

clean_body: | "" | | It's all an act. In the aftermath of mass shootings, Donald Trump pretends to have courage when it comes to taking on gun violence. But, in the end, he never does anything. All it takes is one call from the NRA, and he falls into line. Parkland. El Paso. Las Vegas. Orlando. Dayton. Every time, Trump calls for reforms. He makes a public scene about the need for universal background checks. And then... nothing. And the NRA gets its way. "" Donald Trump, Mitch McConnell, and their pals at the NRA are betting that if they keep quiet, eventually the storm of anger about gun violence will pass. Not if we have anything to say about it. Our movement is growing. It will bring strength to polling places all across America, and a massive change our country and families deserve. "" Jeff "" | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. ---|--- | ""

name: Sara Gideon
subject: Susan Collins just launched her first TV ad of this campaign.
body:
I'm ready -- and I know you are too.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd295/2550190006/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Big news -
**Susan Collins just launched her first TV ad!**
You know what that means? This race is heating up - and I need to know you're with me:
[**Make a $3 contribution to support our campaign today. Together, we will defeat Susan Collins and elect a Senator who puts Maine first.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd294/2550190006/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191019-full")
Control of the Senate is at stake, so Mitch McConnell and big Republican donors will spend whatever it takes to keep this seat for Collins. They'll try to use their money to stop our momentum.
I know this grassroots team won't sit back and let them do that. But how we respond today - in this moment - will determine how the rest of this campaign plays out. That's why I have to ask:
[**Chip in $3 now and let 's show Susan Collins, Mitch McConnell, and all her special interest donors that we are ready for this fight.**](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd294/2550190006/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191019-full")
Let's do this,
\- _Sara_
****[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd294/2550190006/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTEwMTktZnVsbCJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-october?refcode=em191019-full")****

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd26b/2550190006/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802ca1/4bef7a87/6b53ecd8/287fd26a/2550190006/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

subject: We're so close to our two millionth contribution -- and you might get a phone call from Elizabeth!

When we hit two million contributions, we'll show the wealthy and well-connected that this election isn't decided by super PACs and lobbyists -- it's decided by our voices and our votes. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528196/45c30650/10dad2e9a/66f35fd6/496369019/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
"Hey, how are you, Elizabeth Warren?"

"Well, I am particularly good. I'm calling you because you made the millionth contribution to my campaign!"

That's how Elizabeth's phone call started with our one millionth donor, Caitlyn. **When Caitlyn chipped in to power this movement, she had no idea that her donation would be the one millionth. Elizabeth called her twice before she picked up, and you could be next!**

**[Your donation today could be this grassroots movement's two millionth contribution-- and Elizabeth might give you a call. Chip in now for your chance to get a double woo-hoo thank you!](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528196/45c30650/10dad2e9a/66f35fd8/496369019/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzc2Rl9UTUNfRE9DX1dfMjAxOTEwMTlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK76F_TMC_DOC_W_20191019_V1S1_P")**

>
On their phone call, Caitlyn, an ESL teacher, told Elizabeth she was rooting for her and would be knocking doors to help spread the word. And that's how we'll build this movement -- person to person and door by door.

Fighting side by side with grassroots donors like Caitlyn, we're working to make sure our government works for everyone -- not just the people who can write big campaign checks.

**When we hit two million contributions, we'll show the wealthy and well-connected that this election isn't decided by super PACs and lobbyists -- it's decided by our voices and our votes.**

**[Chip in today to power this movement towards big, structural change-- and keep your phone nearby! If you see an unknown number, it might be Elizabeth calling to say thank you.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528196/45c30650/10dad2e9a/66f35fd8/496369019/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW9jdDE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNSzc2Rl9UTUNfRE9DX1dfMjAxOTEwMTlfVjFTMV9QIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ew-oct19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMK76F_TMC_DOC_W_20191019_V1S1_P")**

Thanks again for all you do,

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Unions make us stronger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, The United Auto Workers (UAW) and General Motors have reached a tentative deal that would end this historic month-long strike, with the deal now going to members for voting and potential ratification. Workers began the strike after contract negotiations with GM fell through over their move to transfer more production to Mexico, shuttering plants in America and putting many skilled workers out of a job. This strike is about more than just GM, though. It's about workers being able to speak up and demand fair treatment, livable wages, and company benefits. It's about workers being valued for their skills and expertise. It's about companies not being able to shut out and ignore workers when they voice concerns. The Trump administration has been noticeably silent on this strike \-- probably because Trump campaigned on helping workers but has instead stood by while plants close, company profits soar, and workers' rights are being torn to shreds by judges he nominated. We want to know what engaged Democratic voters think about this so we can set up our strategy to help workers in the 2020 elections: **Do you support unions?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb7/6e9863e8/15b47b82/1db0f36d/872668865/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BKZFCwDx") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb7/6e9863e8/15b47b82/1db0f36d/872668865/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/BKZFCwDx") When Democrats Turn Out stands with the UAW members on the picket line and all workers \-- because we know that when people organize, we win. -WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcddb7/6e9863e8/15b47b82/1db0f36c/872668865/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191019b.ND-b&refcode2=xwrX8DyO8CSv9tF67R7k")
---
|
---

| | Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
---

Washington, DC 20003

Peter,

It's no secret that Matt Bevin's campaign is floundering. Between fighting with his own lieutenant governor, shaking up his campaign team and trailing in most polls, his dysfunctional campaign has been making D.C. Republicans very nervous.

And now _Politico_ is reporting:
"The White House is planning an 11th-hour push to stave off an embarrassing defeat for the Republican governor of Kentucky..."

name: Tim Ryan
subject: We mourn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for America
body:
|
---
Friends,

Today, our nation mourns the loss of a man whose compassion and fearlessness inspired so much of the good around us. A man whose unrelenting fight for justice and equality paved the way for decades worth of progress. A man, friends, who poured his heart and soul into the betterment of our country and the advancement of our most sacred principles.

Representative Elijah Cummings was more than just a congressman. He was a fighter -- an inspiration -- a hero. His work to protect and expand civil rights, safeguard our democracy, and give a voice to the voiceless will not soon -- if ever -- be forgotten. Not for us, and certainly not for the millions of American lives he touched with his immense wisdom and generosity.

He rose to every occasion and showed the rest of us what it meant to be a leader. I was fortunate to work alongside him in the House. I will never forget his kindness, the fierce passion for the American people, and his unwavering dedication to furthering liberty and justice for all.

Congressman Cummings never stopped fighting to make sure that future generations would have access to the same opportunities as he did. His contributions in the House are too plentiful to begin to count -- his contributions as an American even greater. We will remember him forever.

With admiration,
Tim

|
---

clean_body: | Friends, Today, our nation mourns the loss of a man whose compassion and fearlessness inspired so much of the good around us. A man whose unrelenting fight for justice and equality paved the way for decades worth of progress. A man, friends, who poured his heart and soul into the betterment of our country and the advancement of our most sacred principles. Representative Elijah Cummings was more than just a congressman. He was a fighter -- an inspiration -- a hero. His work to protect and expand civil rights, safeguard our democracy, and give a voice to the voiceless will not soon -- if ever -- be forgotten. Not for us, and certainly not for the millions of American lives he touched with his immense wisdom and generosity. He rose to every occasion and showed the rest of us what it meant to be a leader. I was fortunate to work alongside him in the House. I will never forget his kindness, the fierce passion for the American people, and his unwavering dedication to furthering liberty and justice for all. Congressman Cummings never stopped fighting to make sure that future generations would have access to the same opportunities as he did. His contributions in the House are too plentiful to begin to count -- his contributions as an American even greater. We will remember him forever. With admiration, Tim | Paid for by Tim Ryan for America Contribute now to help Tim take his vision for our future across the United States! name: Joe Sestak
subject: 97 miles into my walk across New Hampshire
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Friday and Saturday were days 6 and 7 of my walk across the Granite State — walking in the shoes of New Hampshirites.
My Friday morning walk began in Manchester and would end later that evening in Raymond. The first event of the day was on immigration with the Granite State Organizing Project. The organization is a leading group fighting for social and racial justice, including for immigrants.
In Raymond, I stopped in at the Granite State Trade school to talk about Training for a Lifetime. This program will entail a system-wide transformation of our national job training infrastructure, because we currently spend just .001% of our GDP on labor force training — the lowest of all developed countries. In the military, we constantly train and re-train servicemembers because technology changes so rapidly. But while technology might become obsolete, a hard worker never will. My "Training for a Lifetime" program will involve more support for public-private partnerships to increase investment in job training, more federal funding for state and local training programs, more registered apprenticeships on federally-funded building or infrastructure repair projects, and developing a national apprenticeship program for one-on-one training.
Jim was kind enough to show me a specialized machine for training workers on HVAC operation. To see more about my visit to Granite State Trade School, click [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022891/111697811/-1216012108?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&s=20).
Later Friday afternoon, I stuck a stake in the ground to come back to later, and drove to Concord to visit with Luke Bonner, former professional basketball player. We had fun but spoke about some serious topics. My time in that gym brought back memories from days of pickup ball at Cardinal O'Hara High School and the U.S. Naval Academy! For reference, Luke is 7 feet tall. Watch me drain a bucket [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022892/111697812/-1034725849?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798&s=20).
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022893/111697813/-1084476337?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
I also talked to Paul Steinhauser of Fox News (read [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022894/111697814/836195489?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)) as I walked from Manchester to Raymond. NBC 10 Boston also covered my walk ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022895/111697815/2008187617?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)).
On Saturday, I walked from Raymond to North Hampton. 20 miles! The morning walk began early again, 6 AM. At about 9 I left for the Hooksett, NH to meet with the local Democrats, and to stop by Robie's Country store. Robie's has been welcoming presidential candidates for years - and first opened its doors in 1822!
Upon arriving in Exeter, I spoke to seniors at the Riverwoods retirement community about healthcare, small businesses, American global leadership, wealth inequality, immigration and how to unite this country.
My event walk culminated in North Hampton. It's gone by so fast! Tomorrow is day 8, the final day of my walk. I will be walking from North Hampton to Portsmouth. For my schedule for the day,** please check out our events page ([here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022896/111697816/-1258320616?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&emci=f3a63dd2-c4f2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&emdi=0d209db1-cbf2-e911-b5e9-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798 "This external link will open in a new window")).**
[**CONTRIBUTE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11022897/111697817/1355280837?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDIwOWRiMS1jYmYyLWU5MTEtYjVlOS0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pIYYLEVUdKQ86MX_q03UnRLjGgcx3Wb5d7sEniOgYVY=&refcode=em101919email)

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President.
Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

clean_body: We announced our goal of two million contributions a few days ago, and we're so close to reaching it -- but we need your help! | | | "" We announced our goal of two million contributions a few days ago, and we're so close to reaching it -- but we need your help! This is a people-powered movement -- we're not taking big checks from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists, or holding exclusive fundraisers for multi-millionaires. Our movement is entirely funded by grassroots donations. And if you make a contribution today to help get to two million, we'll put your name on our Grassroots Donor Wall as our way of saying thank you! We're so close, and your support would be crucial to reaching two million contributions and showing the country that our movement for big, structural change is stronger than ever. If you're able to, a donation today would go a long way. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Everything our grassroots supporters do is crucial to the future of our movement. When supporters like you make a donation, you're helping hire more organizers across the country, helping Elizabeth hold more town halls to talk with voters in their communities, and helping promote bold solutions to problems that working Americans face -- like Medicare for All, canceling student debt, funding Universal Child Care, and more. We're endlessly thankful for all of the people nationwide who are fired up about big, structural change. And as we get closer to two million contributions, with your help, we can reach our goal and power this movement. "" Thanks for being in this fight, Team Warren "" | | | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for President All content (C) 2019 Warren for President, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117

| Stand with John Hickenlooper for Senate is a project of 314 Action, a grassroots community of nearly 1 million scientists and pro-science advocates working to elect Democratic scientists who will use science and facts to address some of our most pressing issues like climate change and health care. In 2018 we played a pivotal role in flipping the US House of Representatives by electing 9 Democratic scientists to the House and Senate as well as over 100 to key legislative districts while raising over $5.2 million with an average donation of just $27.55. Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

body:
| |
---
| Team: We wanted to make sure your answer was recorded for our October Priorities Survey. Select an option below to submit your top issue!
* * *

As a Democratic champion fighting back against the Trump administration's hateful agenda, Ed Markey needs to know where you stand on important issues facing our country.

Will you take one minute of your time to complete our October Priorities Survey?

**What issue is most important to you?**

**[BANNING ASSAULT WEAPONS](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsH/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[COMBATING THE OPIOID EPIDEMIC](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsE/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[MARIJUANA LEGALIZATION](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsF/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[PROTECTING OBAMACARE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsC/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[PASSING A GREEN NEW DEAL](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsD/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[DEFENDING EQUAL RIGHTS](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[RESTORING NET NEUTRALITY](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsB/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[PROTECTING SOCIAL SECURITY](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsO/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[ENSURING REPRODUCTIVE FREEDOM](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsP/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[DEMANDING IMMIGRATION REFORM](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsHBQ/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[HOLDING PRESIDENT TRUMP ACCOUNTABLE](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsHBA/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**

**[OVERTURNING CITIZENS UNITED](https://ma.edmarkey.com/page/m/10c1dcbf/693b8b0a/444b2048/72de61c4/376364955/VEsHBw/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://act.edmarkey.com/thank-you/")**
